The following events took place in '''3964 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Padawan Massacre]].<ref name="KOTOR 1" />
*The [[Jedi Covenant]] begins pursuit of [[Zayne Carrick]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
*The [[Mandalorian Wars]] break out into open conflict between the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="Campaign" /> with the [[Battle of Vanquo]], beginning the phase known as the [[Mandalorian Wars#Onslaught|Mandalorian Onslaught]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
